ogTitle: Poatina vs Police Point: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Poatina and Police Point.
heading: Poatina vs Police Point — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Poatina, Tasmania and Police Point, Tasmania. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Police Point has a lower overall climate risk score (29/100) compared to Poatina (34/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Poatina or Police Point safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Poatina has a flood risk score of 30/100, while Police Point scores 22/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Poatina scores 32/100 for bushfire risk. Police Point scores 22/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Poatina or Police Point?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Police Point has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 0.58% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
